posts.author: Romain (Barral)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, happy to join that community, I am not an expert in Monday, just start to use to excuse me if i ask a stupid questions.
I have 2 boards, one with a first timeline of materiel delivery, and a second board where i have on subitem level the mirror of that timeline and another timeline (manual). Would it be possible that when the first timeline (mirror) change then manual is automatically updated?
I try to search or to do it by myself but did not find the solution.
Thanks a lot for your help.

posts.author: rehan.abdul (Rehan AQ | monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
That’s doable with make. I have done that multiple times but with make. Let me know if you need help with setting up that.

Regards
Rehan
Book Free Consultation

posts.author: teresa32yon (Teresa Yon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Welcome to the community! No worries at all, feel free to ask any questions you have.

To achieve automatic updates between your two boards, you can use the Mirror Column and Connect Boards Column features in Monday.com. Here’s how you can set it up:

Add the Connect Boards Column: This will link the items in your boards together.

Add the Mirror Column: This will reflect information from one board to another.

Link the Boards: Go to the Connect Boards Column settings and link the items from your first board (with the timeline) to the corresponding items on your second board.

Select Columns to Mirror: In the Mirror Column settings, select the timeline column from the first board to be mirrored on the second board.

Once set up, any changes made to the timeline on the first board will automatically update the mirrored timeline on the second board.

Does this help you get started?
Summit Health com

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Romain

We’ve developed an app called Connected Boards Automations. Which allows to run robust automations on connected boards column. Because the items and the subitem are connected via connected boards, you can make sync changes between the two timelines easily.
